data.title: Nomura's Laser Digital Seeks U.S. Trust Bank Charter for Digital Assets
data.description: Laser Digital, a subsidiary of Japan's Nomura Group based in Switzerland, has applied for a U.S. national trust bank charter with a focus on digital assets and custody services. According to NS3.AI, this initiative is part of a broader trend where cryptocurrency firms are pursuing banking charters under recently favorable U.S. Treasury policies. This shift indicates a growing institutional emphasis on regulatory compliance and expansion within the digital asset sector.

data.title: WisdomTree Brings Tokenized Funds to Solana in Multichain RWA Push
data.description:
Asset manager WisdomTree has expanded its tokenization platform to the Solana network, advancing its multichain strategy for real-world assets (RWAs). The move enables both institutional and retail participants to access WisdomTree’s regulated financial products directly on Solana, marking one of the most comprehensive deployments of tokenized traditional assets on a high-throughput blockchain.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/wisdomtree-brings-tokenized-funds-to-solana-in-multichain-rwa-push/

data.title: Wall Street giants raise concerns over the U.S. SEC’s aggressively pro-crypto agenda
data.description:
Wall Street giants met with the U. S. SEC crypto task Force on Tuesday to discuss the financial watchdog’s aggressive push toward a pro-crypto agenda.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/wall-street-giants-raise-concerns-u-s-secs/

data.title: White House To Host Crypto And Banking Leaders In Push To Break Regulatory Deadlock
data.description:
The White House is set to bring together senior figures from the banking and crypto industries on Monday in an effort to break the deadlock over the crypto market structure bill, namely the CLARITY Act, according to a Reuters report. The planned meeting comes as progress on the bill has stalled amid growing tensions between the two sectors over how digital assets should be regulated. White House Crypto Council To Lead Talks People familiar with the matter said the meeting will be organized by the White House’s crypto council and will include executives from several industry trade groups. Related Reading: Bitcoin Price Braces For FOMC Volatility As History Shows Major Post‑Fed Sell‑Offs Discussions are expected to focus on one of the most contentious aspects of the legislation: whether and how crypto firms should be allowed to offer interest or other rewards on customer holdings of stablecoins
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/breaking-news-ticker/white-house-to-host-crypto-and-banking-leaders-in-push-to-break-regulatory-deadlock/

data.title: Federal Reserve Chair Powell Comments on Gold Price Surge
data.description: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell remarked that the recent increase in gold prices is not of substantial importance to the Federal Reserve. According to NS3.AI, Powell highlighted that while the Fed monitors changes in asset prices, it does not concentrate on specific fluctuations in gold. He also advised his successor to maintain a non-political stance in their position.

data.title: Spot gold broke through $5,350 per ounce, setting a new all-time high.
data.description: Spot gold broke through $5,350 per ounce, setting a new all-time high, up 3.29% on the day. (Jinshi)

data.title: Powell advises his successor to stay away from politics.
data.description: Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell responded on Wednesday to questions about what he would tell his successor. He stated that he would advise the next Fed chair not to get involved in politics. "Don't get involved in elected politics, don't get caught up in elected politics," Powell said at a press conference. He added, "Our window to democratic accountability is Congress. Going to Congress and engaging with the people is not a passive burden, but an active and regular obligation. If you want democratic legitimacy, you have to earn it through interaction with our elected oversight bodies." (Jinshi)

data.title: Japanese yen slides to historic lows as U.S. rejects currency intervention
data.description:
The Japanese yen dropped further in value against the dollar following U. S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent’s refusal to intervene in saving the faltering currency. The USD/JPY pair has fallen to historic lows recently due to policy decisions by the Japanese government and central bank. This news signifies a growing divergence between U. S. and Japanese monetary […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/japanese-yen-slides-to-historic-lows-as-u-s-rejects-currency-intervention/

data.title: Federal Reserve Adjusts Employment Risk Language Amid Labor Market Stability
data.description: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell has announced the removal of language concerning downside employment risks from the Fed's latest policy statement. According to NS3.AI, this change reflects signs of stability in the labor market. Despite this positive development, Powell cautioned investors and policymakers against over-interpreting the current employment data. His remarks indicate a cautious optimism regarding job market conditions amid ongoing economic uncertainties.

data.title: Federal Reserve Chair Powell Undecided on Future Board Role
data.description: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell has not yet decided whether he will continue to serve on the Board of Governors after his term as chair concludes. According to NS3.AI, Powell's current term as a board member is set to last until 2028. He declined to comment on a subpoena and highlighted that the responsibility for managing the value of the U.S. dollar lies with the Treasury Department, not the Federal Reserve.
